scripts.content:check: npm run validate:content && npm run validate:sprites && npm run content:index && git diff --exit-code
scripts.smoke: npm run validate:content && npm run seed:check && npm run seed:system:check
scripts.audit: node -e "console.log('Audit artifacts: AUDIT_REPORT.md, docs/COMPLETION_AUDIT.md, docs/COMPLETION_REPORT.md, DEPLOYMENT_BLOCKERS.md, docs/STANDALONE_SYSTEM_PLAN.md')"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:sprites && npm run content:index && git diff --exit-code && npm test && npm run build && npm run seed:check && npm run seed:system:check && npm run check:governance && npm run check:secrets && npm run check:prompts && npm run test:prompt-evals && npm run test:prompt-release-authority && npm run check:ecosystem
scripts.check:release-env: npm run check:provider-evidence && npm run check:observability && npm run check:alerts
scripts.done: npm run audit && npm run smoke && npm run check
scripts.web:smoke:routes: npm run web:build && npm run smoke:routes --prefix apps/web
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run web:check && npm run web:smoke:routes
scripts.deploy: node -e "console.error('Deployment is intentionally blocked in urai-content until provider evidence, deployed smoke, E2E, observability, and rollback evidence are GREEN.'); process.exit(1)"
